upgrades.name: Increased Production
upgrades.description: Grows 2 extra Banana bunches per round.

upgrades.name: Greater Production
upgrades.description: Grows 2 MORE extra Banana bunches per round.

upgrades.name: Banana Research Facility
upgrades.description: Produces 5 large Banana crates every round worth $300 each.

upgrades.name: Banana Central
upgrades.description: You want Banana? We have Banana!

upgrades.name: Long Life Bananas
upgrades.description: Bananas last 30 seconds before rotting instead of 15.

upgrades.name: Valuable Bananas
upgrades.description: Bananas are worth 25% more cash per bunch.

upgrades.name: Monkey Bank
upgrades.description: All money generated by this farm is now stored in the bank and earns 15% interest each round.

upgrades.name: IMF Loan
upgrades.description: IMF Loan ability: Gives you $9,000 but you have to pay it back over time.

upgrades.name: Monkey-Nomics
upgrades.description: For when you're too big to fail...

upgrades.name: EZ Collect
upgrades.description: The collect radius of Bananas is larger and uncollected Bananas auto-collect for half value. Monkey Banks will glow when full and ready to collect.

upgrades.name: Banana Salvage
upgrades.description: Uncollected Bananas auto-collect for almost their full amount, and Banks auto-collect when full. Farm sellback rate increased by 10%

upgrades.name: Marketplace
upgrades.description: Generates money each round and adds it to your total. No fuss.

upgrades.name: Central Market
upgrades.description: Earns heaps of money each round and gives Merchantmen +10% income.

upgrades.name: Monkey Wall Street
upgrades.description: Hub of Monkey trades earns colossal income, generates lives each round, and collects income in radius.
